overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian residential neighborhood at dusk. The scene transitions from a street intersection through overgrown courtyard areas with traditional houses mixed with futuristic skyscrapers in the background, ending with the character entering an elevated highway overpass. The atmosphere is moody with blue-hour lighting and scattered artificial lights from windows and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with palm trees transitioning to residential entry

events.description: character crosses the asphalt road from sidewalk to residential area
moves from open street into residential courtyard with overgrown vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the street and entering a residential neighborhood with traditional houses

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the street in the background

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street, iconic to the neighborhood
single-story wooden residential buildings with lit windows
tall modern glass and steel towers visible in the background contrasting with traditional architecture
illuminated street lamps along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a street intersection during dusk, with the character crossing asphalt roads lined with palm trees. Traditional single-story houses with warm interior lighting appear on the right while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distant background, establishing the mixed-era architecture of the setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown residential courtyard with traditional houses

events.description: character navigates through narrow path between overgrown vegetation and houses

agents.ego_description: walking through tight residential paths with overgrown yards, passing houses with distinctive features

notable_agents.action: resident in white shirt walking through the courtyard

entered.detail: house with American flag hanging from the porch roof
house with large satellite dish on the roof
green-painted house with distinctive turquoise door and wooden porch
tall grass and unkempt plants covering the ground between houses

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into a narrow residential courtyard with overgrown vegetation and dirt paths. Houses feature distinctive details like an American flag and a satellite dish. The space feels enclosed with limited sky visibility, creating an intimate neighborhood atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with digital billboards and parked vehicles

events.description: large digital billboards become visible as character emerges from tight residential paths
character approaches street with moving traffic and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past parked cars and illuminated billboards, heading toward an overpass

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens showing commercial content
sedan and pickup trucks parked along the street curb
paved pedestrian walkway along the road

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the enclosed courtyard onto a concrete sidewalk alongside a street. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with advertisements, while parked vehicles line the curb. The futuristic city skyline becomes more prominent in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass with guard rails

events.description: character enters the ramp leading up to the elevated highway overpass
character ascends the curved ramp of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp of an elevated highway overpass, moving away from the residential area toward the main road

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving along the overpass road

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with guard rails and street lighting
metal safety barrier along the edge of the overpass ramp
solid concrete dividers separating pedestrian and vehicle paths

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending the ramp of an elevated highway overpass. The environment shifts to artificial lighting under the concrete structure, with guard rails lining the path. Vehicles pass by on the road as the character moves upward, leaving the residential neighborhood behind and heading toward the futuristic city center visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet residential intersection into the heart of a futuristic urban infrastructure. It begins at a street intersection at dusk, crossing asphalt roads lined with palm trees and traditional houses that contrast with distant, looming skyscrapers. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed courtyard filled with overgrown vegetation and dirt paths, creating an intimate neighborhood atmosphere. The camera then emerges from this greenery onto a concrete sidewalk illuminated by large digital billboards and parked vehicles, making the futuristic skyline more prominent. Finally, the environment transitions to the artificial lighting of an elevated highway overpass as the character ascends a ramp, leaving the residential area behind for the city center.
